text:
There was a small village nestled among hills. Not very far. Everything you'd need. Nothing much grew though. Just enough berries. That's what folks ate.

There was a fox. He lived there. He loved foxberries. People always chased him away. He'd stalk them.

One night. The full moon.

He snuck near.

There's a girl.

She notices him.

He smiles.

They eat berries.

It lasts.

They talk.

She likes him.

Sooner. They walk. They talk. Lots.

One day.

He says.

You.

She thinks.

I love you.

She smiles.

Like forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
